name: Asteroid Run
description: Third-person space flight through an asteroid field — key 1 = fire cannons, key 2 = launch missiles, key 3 = afterburner boost, key 4 = barrel roll, key 5 = deploy shield, key 6 = shatter asteroid, key 7 = turbo boost, key 8 = land on planet; director: UFO / enemy fighter / asteroid storm / solar flare / wormhole / comet / repair beacon / planet looms closer

base.default: A rugged industrial spaceship with a grey armored hull, yellow-and-black hazard markings and glowing blue engine thrusters, flying through a dense field of jagged pale-grey rock asteroids in deep space. The world contains EXACTLY ONE large ringed planet in the background at a fixed position AND EXACTLY ONE massive spire-shaped asteroid straight ahead at a fixed position AND EXACTLY ONE cluster of tumbling boulders on the left at a fixed position AND EXACTLY ONE distant bright star on the right at a fixed position. Cold blue starlight, drifting rock dust, deep black star-flecked sky, cinematic sci-fi space, sharp high detail.

default.static: Third-person chase view from close behind and slightly above the spaceship, the ship's rear hull and glowing blue thrusters centred in frame at constant size — never a first-person cockpit view. Neither ship nor camera moves on its own; look-input is the only camera motion, arcing around the stationary centred ship while held.
default.dynamic: Strict third-person chase view from behind the ship, its hull and thrusters filling frame centre as it flies forward — never first-person. It holds a fixed rear position and does not rotate around the ship; look-input becomes the ship banking and changing heading.

default.static: The ship holds position and hovers in place among the drifting asteroids, thrusters idling with a soft blue glow, only slow drift and small attitude corrections as rock dust floats past the hull.
default.dynamic: The ship thrusts forward at cruising speed, weaving between the jagged asteroids, its blue engines streaming as rocks slide past on either side and the ringed planet swings across the background.

events.name: Fire Cannons
events.detail: The ship's forward laser cannons open fire straight ahead, spitting rapid bright blue energy bolts that streak into the asteroid field; the muzzles flash, the hull shudders faintly with each shot, and a nearby asteroid bursts into glowing fragments and rock dust. The main subject stays EXACTLY ONE in frame — a single main character, no second copy of the main subject, no duplicate and no clone of it.

events.name: Launch Missiles
events.detail: A single missile blasts from the ship's underwing hardpoint and streaks ahead down the field, dragging a long trail of white smoke and orange flame as it corkscrews toward a distant asteroid, then slams into it and erupts in a bright expanding fireball of debris. EXACTLY ONE rocket in frame — one single missile, no second missile, no twin missiles, no duplicate and no clone. The main subject stays EXACTLY ONE in frame — a single main character, no second copy of the main subject, no duplicate and no clone of it.

events.name: Afterburner Boost
events.detail: The ship's blue thrusters flare into a brilliant white-hot afterburner and the ship surges forward with a sudden burst of speed, the asteroids stretching and rushing past in a blur of motion streaks as the engines roar. The main subject stays EXACTLY ONE in frame — a single main character, no second copy of the main subject, no duplicate and no clone of it.

events.name: Barrel Roll
events.detail: The ship snaps into a fast barrel roll, rotating cleanly around its own axis to dodge, its thrusters tracing a spiraling blue arc through the drifting rocks before it levels out and steadies. The main subject stays EXACTLY ONE in frame — a single main character, no second copy of the main subject, no duplicate and no clone of it.

events.name: Deploy Shield
events.detail: A translucent hexagonal energy shield flickers to life and wraps around the ship in a glowing blue dome, rippling and sparking as bits of rock and dust glance off it, then holding steady around the hull. The main subject stays EXACTLY ONE in frame — a single main character, no second copy of the main subject, no duplicate and no clone of it.

events.name: Shatter Asteroid
events.detail: The ship locks onto the large spire-shaped asteroid straight ahead and unleashes a concentrated burst of blue cannon fire into it; the impacts flare bright, jagged cracks race across the rock, and the asteroid SPLITS APART into several massive tumbling chunks that break away and drift in different directions, trailing glowing debris, sparks, and expanding clouds of rock dust as the pieces spread across the field. The main subject stays EXACTLY ONE in frame — a single main character, no second copy of the main subject, no duplicate and no clone of it.

events.name: Turbo Boost
events.detail: The ship slams into full overdrive — every engine igniting into a massive white-blue plume as a shockwave ripples off the hull and the ship rockets forward at extreme speed; the entire asteroid field smears into long streaking light trails warping past, the distant stars stretch into thin lines, and the thrusters scream at maximum burn. The main subject stays EXACTLY ONE in frame — a single main character, no second copy of the main subject, no duplicate and no clone of it.

events.name: UFO Appears
events.detail: A sleek alien UFO — a smooth metallic saucer ringed with pulsing green and violet lights — drops out of the starfield ahead and glides into view among the asteroids, hovering silently with a soft glow; its rotating underside sweeps thin beams of light across the drifting rocks as it settles into the scene. EXACTLY ONE UFO in frame — one single saucer, no second UFO, no duplicate and no clone of it. The main subject stays EXACTLY ONE in frame — a single main character, no second copy of the main subject, no duplicate and no clone of it.

events.name: Land on Planet
events.detail: The ship descends toward a nearby planet, dropping through its upper atmosphere as the curved surface swells to fill the view, and settles down onto the planet's terrain, dust kicking up around the landing site as it touches down. The main subject stays EXACTLY ONE in frame — a single main character, no second copy of the main subject, no duplicate and no clone of it.

events.name: Planet Appears
events.detail: A large planet swings into view ahead in space, its curved horizon and banded surface rising into frame and dominating the starfield, growing steadily larger as the ship approaches; it stays, looming ahead. The main subject stays EXACTLY ONE in frame — a single main character, no second copy of the main subject, no duplicate and no clone of it.

events.name: Enemy Fighter Attacks
events.detail: A single hostile alien fighter — a lean dart-shaped craft with glowing red engine slits — swoops in from the starfield ahead and strafes the ship, spitting streaks of red plasma fire that flash past the hull and scatter off the asteroids. EXACTLY ONE enemy fighter in frame — one single attacker, no second fighter, no duplicate and no clone of it. The main subject stays EXACTLY ONE in frame — a single main character, no second copy of the main subject, no duplicate and no clone of it.

events.name: Asteroid Storm
events.detail: A dense surge of tumbling pale-grey asteroids sweeps in across the whole field, the rocks crowding thick and close and hurtling past the ship on every side as dust and debris fill the black space; the storm of rock keeps coming. The main subject stays EXACTLY ONE in frame — a single main character, no second copy of the main subject, no duplicate and no clone of it.

events.name: Solar Flare
events.detail: The distant bright star on the right erupts in a blinding solar flare, a searing wave of white-gold light and radiation washing across the asteroid field and flooding the frame with harsh glare as the rocks flash bright and heat-haze ripples through space; the glare lingers. The main subject stays EXACTLY ONE in frame — a single main character, no second copy of the main subject, no duplicate and no clone of it.

events.name: Wormhole Opens
events.detail: A swirling blue-violet wormhole tears open in the starfield straight ahead, a churning spiral vortex of glowing energy that warps the stars around its rim and pulls drifting dust and small rocks spiraling into its core, hanging open ahead. EXACTLY ONE wormhole in frame — one single vortex, no second wormhole, no duplicate and no clone of it. The main subject stays EXACTLY ONE in frame — a single main character, no second copy of the main subject, no duplicate and no clone of it.

events.name: Comet Streaks By
events.detail: A single brilliant comet blazes across the starfield, a bright icy nucleus trailing a long glowing blue-white tail that sweeps a luminous arc through the black sky behind the drifting asteroids, then carries on across the frame. EXACTLY ONE comet in frame — one single comet, no second comet, no duplicate and no clone of it. The main subject stays EXACTLY ONE in frame — a single main character, no second copy of the main subject, no duplicate and no clone of it.

events.name: Repair Beacon Appears
events.detail: A friendly repair beacon — a compact drone-buoy pulsing with steady green light and ringed by a soft healing glow — drifts into view among the asteroids ahead and hovers, sweeping a gentle restorative beam of green energy over the ship's hull. EXACTLY ONE repair beacon in frame — one single buoy, no second beacon, no duplicate and no clone of it. The main subject stays EXACTLY ONE in frame — a single main character, no second copy of the main subject, no duplicate and no clone of it.

events.name: Planet Looms Closer
events.detail: A vast planet swells larger and larger dead ahead through the starfield, looming steadily closer as the ship races toward it — its curved surface, swirling cloud bands and glowing atmosphere growing to fill more and more of the view, drawing nearer and nearer and dominating the starfield ahead. EXACTLY ONE planet, a single planet, no second planet, no duplicate and no clone.

scene.jumpPrompt: The ship pitches up and climbs, its thrusters flaring as the nose lifts and it ascends above the asteroid field toward the open starfield, then settles into level flight higher up.
scene.crouchPrompt: The ship noses down and dives low, dropping close among the jagged asteroids into a tight, hugging trajectory near the rock surfaces; the view sinks toward the asteroids and holds there, threading between them.
scene.standPrompt: The ship pulls back up out of the dive to its normal cruising altitude, levelling off smoothly as the view lifts back to the standard chase vantage behind the hull.
